TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: t'aring balay 'bagan lga, kmayal maha: "ina, nmnama' inlungan mamu lki, pt'aring ta' "mqumah" lga~ , nama' smr'zyut kwara' qayqaya ppqumah mamu," 'r'aras qu laylaqi', aki mlhani' zyuwaw na qmayah. slsuli mita' qu pinqmahan naha', in gyut pcbaq, ini' qbaq squ zyuwaw na pqmahun lga, phswa' musa' squliq babaw nya' la? izyat pinqmahan na' qu qmayah qasa' ki, pzyux wahi nya', pqmahi kwara' gamil na wahi. zik na pqumah simu ga inblaq pcbaq laylaqi Gaga' na "mqumah".
S.PHON: t ĒariŇč ő≤alaj Ēő≤a…£an l…£a, kmajal mańßa: "ina, nmnama Ē inluŇčan mamu lki, pt ĒariŇč ta Ē "mqumańß" l…£a~ , nama Ē s~…ēmr Ēzjut kwara Ē qajqaja ppqumańß mamu," Ēr Ēaras~…ē qu lajlaqi Ē, aki mlńßani Ē zjuwaw na qmajańß. s~…ēls~…ēuli mita Ē qu pinqmańßan nańßa Ē, in …£jut p ¶~ ®ő≤aq, ini Ē qő≤aq s~…ēqu zjuwaw na pqmańßun l…£a, pńßs~…ēwa Ē mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēquliq ő≤aő≤aw nja Ē la? izjat pinqmańßan na Ē qu qmajańß qas~…ēa Ē ki, pzjux wańßi nja Ē, pqmańßi kwara Ē …£amil na wańßi. zik na pqumańß s~…ēimu …£a inő≤laq p ¶~ ®ő≤aq lajlaqi …£a…£a Ē na "mqumańß".
S.FORM: t'aring balay 'bagan lga, kmayal maha: "ina, nmnama' inlungan mamu lki, pt'aring ta' "mqumah" lga~ , nama' smr'zyut kwara' qayqaya ppqumah mamu," 'r'aras qu laylaqi', aki mlhani' zyuwaw na qmayah. slsuli mita' qu pinqmahan naha', in gyut pcbaq, ini' qbaq squ zyuwaw na pqmahun lga, phswa' musa' squliq babaw nya' la? izyat pinqmahan na' qu qmayah qasa' ki, pzyux wahi nya', pqmahi kwara' gamil na wahi. zik na pqumah simu ga inblaq pcbaq laylaqi Gaga' na "mqumah".
S.PHON: t ĒariŇč ő≤alaj Ēő≤a…£an l…£a, kmajal mańßa: "ina, nmnama Ē inluŇčan mamu lki, pt ĒariŇč ta Ē "mqumańß" l…£a~ , nama Ē s~…ēmr Ēzjut kwara Ē qajqaja ppqumańß mamu," Ēr Ēaras~…ē qu lajlaqi Ē, aki mlńßani Ē zjuwaw na qmajańß. s~…ēls~…ēuli mita Ē qu pinqmańßan nańßa Ē, in …£jut p ¶~ ®ő≤aq, ini Ē qő≤aq s~…ēqu zjuwaw na pqmańßun l…£a, pńßs~…ēwa Ē mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēquliq ő≤aő≤aw nja Ē la? izjat pinqmańßan na Ē qu qmajańß qas~…ēa Ē ki, pzjux wańßi nja Ē, pqmańßi kwara Ē …£amil na wańßi. zik na pqumańß s~…ēimu …£a inő≤laq p ¶~ ®ő≤aq lajlaqi …£a…£a Ē na "mqumańß".
